overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character walking along a wet London riverside promenade at night. The London Eye illuminated in red with 'Albion' signage is visible across the River Thames, while strings of decorative lights hang overhead. The scene features reflective wet pavement, historic street lamps, and passing vehicles on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside promenade with overhead string lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement of the riverside path with the London Eye visible across the water

entered.detail: large Ferris wheel illuminated in red with Albion signage visible across the river
overhead decorative lights strung across the promenade
classic black ornate lamp posts with warm yellow light
wooden benches along the riverside railing
trees with autumn foliage lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet riverside promenade at night, with the red-illuminated London Eye visible across the water to the left. Overhead strings of lights stretch along the path, and the reflective pavement mirrors the street lamps and city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path approaching illuminated sightseeing booth

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the illuminated booth structure with Big Ben becoming visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: person standing near the sightseeing booth entrance looking at displays

entered.detail: illuminated tour booth with bright white LED strips and digital screens showing advertisements
famous clock tower visible in the distant cityscape ahead

segments.scene_description: Approaching a brightly illuminated sightseeing tour booth on the right, the character continues along the embankment. The booth features digital displays and Union Jack imagery, while Big Ben becomes visible in the distant center.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside promenade with distant view of Big Ben

events.description: passing the sightseeing booth and entering a darker stretch of the promenade with Big Ben visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the booth and continuing along the riverside path with Big Ben visible ahead on the left

segments.scene_description: Having passed the booth, the character walks along a darker section of the promenade with Big Ben now visible ahead on the left. The London Eye remains visible in the distance as the path continues alongside the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked London promenade that shifts from a view of the illuminated riverfront toward a bustling tourist hub. It begins with the character walking past the red-lit London Eye across the water, while strings of overhead lights and street lamps cast shimmering reflections on the wet pavement. As the character advances along the embankment, the perspective expands to reveal the silhouette of Big Ben appearing in the distant center. The scene then shifts toward the right as the camera approaches a brightly lit sightseeing tour booth adorned with digital displays and Union Jack imagery.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal riverside promenade that shifts from a sheltered area toward a wider view of the city's landmarks. It begins as the character moves past a booth and enters a darker stretch of the walkway, where the reflective wet pavement leads deeper into the night. As the camera advances, the perspective opens up to reveal Big Ben emerging ahead on the left. The scene then maintains its steady forward momentum, keeping the illuminated London Eye visible in the distance while the path continues to wind alongside the river.
